source.description: A reviewed six-panel raster contact sheet showing one traditional wooden hand plane and one curled shaving from pale construction to a finished graphite and colored-pencil sketch.
source.notes: The same three-quarter view, long wooden body, pale rear-tote construction, front knob, iron, wedge, and single shaving must persist after introduction.

process_strategy: Construct the long plane body and pale rear-tote gesture first while reserving the knob and iron footprints, refine the grips and cutting assembly, then introduce one shaving, grain, bench context, and restrained wood color before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: long wooden plane body and sole
final_elements.description: A low rectangular wooden body in three-quarter perspective with a visible near end and long sole.

final_elements.name: curved rear tote handle
final_elements.description: One curved upright tote established as pale construction above the rear of the body.

final_elements.name: rounded front knob
final_elements.description: One small rounded grip knob near the front of the body.

final_elements.name: angled iron, wedge, and mouth
final_elements.description: A slanted metal cutting iron held by one wooden wedge above a narrow mouth in the body.

final_elements.name: single curled wood shaving
final_elements.description: Exactly one ribbon-like shaving curling forward from the plane mouth.

final_elements.name: wood grain, bench edges, and cast shadow
final_elements.description: Restrained grain on exposed wooden surfaces, two cropped bench-edge strokes, and one soft shadow.

final_elements.name: warm ochre wood and cool-gray iron accents
final_elements.description: Light warm-ochre pencil on wood and cool gray on the established metal iron.

frames.step_name: Block the body and tote gesture
frames.visible_job: Builds a low foreshortened wooden body and sole from pale box guides, adds the pale rear-tote construction, and reserves blank footprints for the front knob and cutting assembly.
introduces: long wooden plane body and sole

frames.step_name: Shape the tote and front knob
frames.visible_job: Clarifies the existing curved rear tote and adds one rounded front knob inside its reserved body area.
requires_prior_elements: long wooden plane body and sole

frames.visible_job: Adds the angled cutting iron, one wooden wedge, and the narrow mouth between the already-established grips.
requires_prior_elements: long wooden plane body and sole

frames.step_name: Curl one shaving from the mouth
frames.visible_job: Draws exactly one broad ribbon shaving emerging from the established mouth and curling forward beside the plane.

frames.step_name: Show wood, steel, and the bench
frames.visible_job: Adds grain only to exposed wooden areas, two cropped bench-edge strokes, one cast shadow, and light ochre and cool-gray pencil on established forms.
introduces: wood grain, bench edges, and cast shadow
warm ochre wood and cool-gray iron accents
requires_prior_elements: long wooden plane body and sole

final_step.visible_job: Strengthens keeper contours, deepens existing wood and steel accents, and clarifies the established single shaving and shadow without adding new structure.
allowed_changes: deeper warm-ochre and cool-gray pencil on existing forms
restrained graphite shading and grain emphasis

rejection_checks: The body, pale tote gesture, knob, iron, wedge, mouth, and one shaving must keep the same three-quarter placement after they appear.
The single shaving may not split, disappear, or change into multiple curls.
Wood grain must stay off surfaces covered by the tote, knob, wedge, or iron.
Color, bench context, and the cast shadow must appear before the finished panel.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must remain a believable handmade sketch rather than polished product art.
